name: awesome
description: A beautifully crafted Android application showcasing modern architecture with MVVM, Coroutines, and Retrofit. Includes dark mode, animations, and offline support.

name: ml-image-classifier
description: A Python-based machine learning pipeline for real-time image classification using TensorFlow and OpenCV. Achieves 94% accuracy on the CIFAR-10 dataset.

name: react-dashboard-ui
description: A fully responsive admin dashboard built with React, TypeScript, and Recharts. Features real-time data visualization, role-based access control, and dark/light themes.

name: go-microservice-starter
description: Production-ready Go microservice boilerplate with Docker, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Prometheus metrics. Includes CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions.

name: flutter-expense-tracker
description: Cross-platform expense tracking app with beautiful animations, interactive charts, and local persistence via Hive. Supports budget goals and CSV export.

name: rust-cli-tools
description: A collection of blazing-fast command-line utilities written in Rust for file processing, JSON transformations, and system monitoring.

name: nextjs-blog-platform
description: A blazing-fast personal blog platform built with Next.js 14, MDX, and Tailwind CSS. Supports SEO, RSS feeds, syntax highlighting, and Vercel deployment.

name: ios-weather-app
description: A SwiftUI weather application using the OpenWeatherMap API. Features hourly forecasts, animated weather icons, location search, and home screen widgets.

name: spring-boot-ecommerce
description: Full-stack e-commerce backend powered by Spring Boot, JPA, and Redis caching. Includes order management, payment gateway integration, and Swagger API docs.

name: data-pipeline-spark
description: Scalable ETL data pipeline using Apache Spark and PySpark. Processes 10M+ records per hour with Delta Lake storage and automatic schema evolution.

name: graphql-api-boilerplate
description: Production-ready GraphQL API starter with Apollo Server, Prisma ORM, JWT authentication, rate limiting, and full test coverage using Jest.

name: cpp-game-engine
description: A lightweight 2D game engine written in C++ using OpenGL and SDL2. Supports ECS architecture, physics simulation, tile maps, and audio management.
